title: Add support for lowering vectors of wires from FIRRTL to RTL

features.name: packed 2D wire array
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration with two packed dimensions specified before the identifier, forming a 2D packed array

features.name: unpacked 2D wire array
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration with one packed dimension and one unpacked dimension after the identifier, forming a 2D unpacked array

features.name: mixed packed and unpacked 3D wire array
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration combining two packed dimensions before the identifier and one unpacked dimension after, forming a 3D mixed wire array

features.name: bitvector bit-select
features.description: Code should include a single-bit select expression on a packed bitvector wire using a constant index

features.name: bitvector part-select range slice
features.description: Code should include a constant-range part-select on a packed bitvector wire producing a single-bit vector slice

features.name: large unpacked reg array as memory
features.description: Code should include a reg declaration with a packed word dimension and a large unpacked address dimension, modeling a memory bank

features.name: 2D unpacked reg array both dimensions after name
features.description: Code should include a one-bit reg with two unpacked dimensions both specified after the identifier, forming a 2D array of single bits

features.name: multiple wire array declarations in single statement
features.description: Code should include a single wire declaration statement that declares two named unpacked arrays sharing the same packed width and unpacked range

features.name: zero-width bitvector wire
features.description: Code should include a wire declared with a zero-width packed dimension such as [0:-1] or equivalent, representing a zero-length bitvector
features.snippet:
// zero-width bitvector: length-0 packed dimension
wire [-1:0] empty_vec;
